Flat concept inventory:
- LLMs for Causal Reasoning | papers: 00f67ddfa49027517b90f491757220abcabdbaea; ff2f48fe6438adcaf860aac0f41c584568beafb5; dcb43c2b28f8991a97f391e6b79d267b411cccfd; 7c4be464e68a11c8f254d9608f31280e9bcda85c; 6ac627f57b26354ab537734d820da4a6a7dde2c6; 64e87fc4d7733d4592d2dbd1c08d33ea07551c8d; 014e5492e28afd79e97637d12852a1c01a3fb7de; c43a4a7b7ea4f4889de051321cb0073fd577f843; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; de549c1592a62c129b8d49c8c0137aa6859b103f; 71fd336f1ca337a638dffb236b432c29cdd19f3d; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; a66ade2f872e726e4ea58278058c4b6df4cbc2be; f0a0e8b6e84207f50db4d24cc4016e40601214ef; d48b29889241551e1ee6622fa78c3fa4159255dd; 4780d0a027c5c5a8e01d7cf697f6296880ffc945; fa4ea8b773ffd6706ba5cf427f9671f81b04dcdd; 04dd492b506e48b7dd91ecb1e1fdb80c1ce30e34; 00cccb9065f0a59e845d5b4d360ce31cf25036be; 7e1a823a3ee88e0964a18b89015614d8cc82d560; 38977b3ffc5edd84f9ce942f2299ce65b966e6f8; a26fa1983e4bc7c5b55cd5a1296afe6f876baa03; 9e557a199972b963d8ac064ac6e625c115c03cde; b39074c68ac53f258fb340d3d24ef868c514310b; be5c4cbde12db1c7bb89e3775e41e207aa4f9ed3; 5f705919c2f25303d5df0178dd8bc3d1ceabe75f; f9b94bcaf706892904c058c37d0087628f371df4; eebdf7303256f081ab1f6a36ff0ea6126e4da484; 0a94fbb5e1c93513523f00e75d672ef4553861f9; 99ad0533f84c110da2d0713d5798e6e14080b159; 3446a23e07529bdf963dd5a66468ecc770543e6e; 025a1a10674d6a1712e59f1fc4800da3b27cdf94; 85b68477a6e031d88b963833e15a4b4fc6855264; 3065d646367f0d894bfb65b7a3a01b448db20b4f; 708450b22ed062da7fa577e10088f25023b1437c; 34901b737b11aa51b688fa18c2eab47639d7b8c6; 4d16457cded23bce6eaa91cd17aefd22af2279f0; 5cfbbf3cdff0f905874589bcd21b2646340a5447; 00147fc393e1f66dbdc8efb2347ae2445a81e9cd; 9f1e2407cce09219fae2fbcd67d0e91bd3135932; 3aafd3e3876cf576c387088dc8ff2b57e962ef6e; 811f451f1991ec5508e67d00375ca4f5d05e0eeb
- Methodology | papers: 00f67ddfa49027517b90f491757220abcabdbaea; ff2f48fe6438adcaf860aac0f41c584568beafb5; dcb43c2b28f8991a97f391e6b79d267b411cccfd; 7c4be464e68a11c8f254d9608f31280e9bcda85c; 6ac627f57b26354ab537734d820da4a6a7dde2c6; 64e87fc4d7733d4592d2dbd1c08d33ea07551c8d; 014e5492e28afd79e97637d12852a1c01a3fb7de; c43a4a7b7ea4f4889de051321cb0073fd577f843; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; de549c1592a62c129b8d49c8c0137aa6859b103f; 71fd336f1ca337a638dffb236b432c29cdd19f3d; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; a66ade2f872e726e4ea58278058c4b6df4cbc2be; f0a0e8b6e84207f50db4d24cc4016e40601214ef; d48b29889241551e1ee6622fa78c3fa4159255dd; 4780d0a027c5c5a8e01d7cf697f6296880ffc945; fa4ea8b773ffd6706ba5cf427f9671f81b04dcdd; 04dd492b506e48b7dd91ecb1e1fdb80c1ce30e34; 00cccb9065f0a59e845d5b4d360ce31cf25036be; 7e1a823a3ee88e0964a18b89015614d8cc82d560; 38977b3ffc5edd84f9ce942f2299ce65b966e6f8; a26fa1983e4bc7c5b55cd5a1296afe6f876baa03; 9e557a199972b963d8ac064ac6e625c115c03cde; b39074c68ac53f258fb340d3d24ef868c514310b; be5c4cbde12db1c7bb89e3775e41e207aa4f9ed3
- LLMs as Reasoning Engines | papers: 00f67ddfa49027517b90f491757220abcabdbaea; ff2f48fe6438adcaf860aac0f41c584568beafb5; dcb43c2b28f8991a97f391e6b79d267b411cccfd; 7c4be464e68a11c8f254d9608f31280e9bcda85c; 6ac627f57b26354ab537734d820da4a6a7dde2c6; 64e87fc4d7733d4592d2dbd1c08d33ea07551c8d; 014e5492e28afd79e97637d12852a1c01a3fb7de; c43a4a7b7ea4f4889de051321cb0073fd577f843; 95ca67ba607d7859ee8eec457f4b59b115d69bf5; de549c1592a62c129b8d49c8c0137aa6859b103f; 71fd336f1ca337a638dffb236b432c29cdd19f3d; 53d128ea815bcc0526856eb5a9c42cc977cb36a7; a66ade2f872e726e4ea58278058c4b6df4cbc2be; f0a0e8b6e84207f50db4d24cc4016e40601214ef; d48b29889241551e1ee6622fa78c3fa4159255dd; 4780d0a027c5c5a8e01d7cf697f6296880ffc945; fa4ea8b773ffd6706ba5cf427f9671f81b04dcdd; 04dd492b506e48b7dd91ecb1e1fdb80c1ce30e34; 00cccb9065f0a59e845d5b4d360ce31cf25036be
- Fine-tuning | papers: 00f67ddfa49027517b90f491757220abcabdbaea; ff2f48fe6438adcaf860aac0f41c584568beafb5; dcb43c2b28f8991a97f391e6b79d267b411cccfd
- Prompt Engineering | papers: 7c4be464e68a11c8f254d9608f31280e9bcda85c; 6ac627f57b26354ab537734d820da4a6a7dde2c6; 64e87fc4d7733d4592d2dbd1c08d33ea07551c8d; 014e5492e28afd79e97637d12852a1c01a3fb7de; c43a4a7b7ea4f4889de051321cb0073fd577f843

- Evaluation | papers: 5f705919c2f25303d5df0178dd8bc3d1ceabe75f; f9b94bcaf706892904c058c37d0087628f371df4; eebdf7303256f081ab1f6a36ff0ea6126e4da484; 0a94fbb5e1c93513523f00e75d672ef4553861f9; 6ac627f57b26354ab537734d820da4a6a7dde2c6; 99ad0533f84c110da2d0713d5798e6e14080b159; 3446a23e07529bdf963dd5a66468ecc770543e6e; 025a1a10674d6a1712e59f1fc4800da3b27cdf94; 85b68477a6e031d88b963833e15a4b4fc6855264; 3065d646367f0d894bfb65b7a3a01b448db20b4f; 708450b22ed062da7fa577e10088f25023b1437c; 34901b737b11aa51b688fa18c2eab47639d7b8c6; 4d16457cded23bce6eaa91cd17aefd22af2279f0; 5cfbbf3cdff0f905874589bcd21b2646340a5447; 00147fc393e1f66dbdc8efb2347ae2445a81e9cd; 9f1e2407cce09219fae2fbcd67d0e91bd3135932; 3aafd3e3876cf576c387088dc8ff2b57e962ef6e; 811f451f1991ec5508e67d00375ca4f5d05e0eeb
